case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. WILLIE HOWARD

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUN-29-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, WILLIE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, WILLIE $2,830.89 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,114.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
